report.summary: Day 70 standup #11: Full rotation since v9 (6 agents, $497). Build-v9 added Symbiotic Protocol + Modular Blockchain Stack guides. Publish confirmed queue empty (422 unique pages). Design-v8 polished both new guides with OG images + related sections. Community-v8 added CLARITY Act content + whale accumulation update (270K BTC). EOD-v9 confirmed 666 files, git locks 8 days. 50 agent runs today ($4,252). CRITICAL UNCHANGED: git locks block all deploys — resolve before any further builds.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v9: Full rotation completed — build-v9, publish (latest), design-v8, community-v8, eod-v9 all ran. Zero commits, zero deploys. Git locks now 8 days old.

BUILD-V9 OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — Symbiotic Protocol Restaking Guide (~3,200 words, Curator Markets, vs EigenLayer/Karak comparison, 5 internal links) and Modular Blockchain Stack Guide 2026 (~3,400 words, DA layer deep-dive, Celestia/EigenDA/Avail comparison, 8 internal links). Both added to PUBLISHED_PAGES batch 8.
PUBLISH OUTPUT: Queue confirmed empty (0 pages). 422 unique published slugs verified on disk. All recent batch pages (12 sampled) pass QA. No new promotions needed — pipeline fully drained.

DESIGN-V8 OUTPUT: 2 new OG images (Symbiotic SVG with node diagram + Modular Stack SVG with 4-layer diagram). Related Guides sections added to both pages (4 cross-links each). Zebra striping on comparison tables. OG metadata switched to static SVGs.

COMMUNITY-V8 OUTPUT: CLARITY Act breakthrough content (tweet + 4-part explainer thread). Whale accumulation updated to 270K BTC / $23B (13-year high). 2 new social cards (whale + CLARITY Act v2). Newsletter v4 with dual regulation+whale angle. Content calendar v5 adds Wednesday CLARITY thread.
EOD-V9 FINDING: 666 uncommitted files (+4 since v8). 42 TS errors unchanged. 335/438 slugs have dedicated page.tsx. Git locks 8 days old. Rate limiter still 0/6 core routes.

MARKET UPDATE: BTC ~$68K, ETH ~$2,057, SOL ~$88.55. Fear & Greed at 10 (Extreme Fear, Day 46). Whale accumulation 270K BTC (13-year high). Exchange supply 2.7M BTC (6-year low). RSI 27 (deeply oversold). CLARITY Act 99% resolved. $243M long liquidations.
SEO RISK: 8 days without deploy. ~123 built pages not live in production. Content pipeline fully drained but nothing reaching Google.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v9: Build-v9 (Symbiotic + Modular guides), publish (queue empty verification), design-v8 (2 OG images + related sections + table polish), community-v8 (CLARITY Act content + whale update + 2 social cards + newsletter v4), eod-v9 (QA cycle). 5 agents + this standup = 6 runs, $497 human-equivalent.

TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 18+ learn guides built, 13 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES, 12+ OG images, 30+ social posts + 13 SVG cards, 9 QA cycles, 8 design audits, 50 agent runs across ~8.3 rotations. ZERO deployed to production.
BLOCKER [P0 — 8 DAYS]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) since Mar 16. Blocks ALL commits and deploys. Fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock — requires Jefe's manual intervention.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: Rate limiter not wired to 6 core API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: /api/defi-yields missing fallback data.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 42 TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts masked by ignoreBuildErrors.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs without page.tsx, 5 pages missing OG images.
PUBLISH_QUEUE EMPTY: No more pages to promote. Build cycles generating content with no deploy path.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS AND DEPLOY: 8 days blocked. 666 uncommitted files at risk. rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add → commit → push → verify Vercel auto-deploy. This remains the ONLY priority that matters.

PRIORITY 2 — HALT ALL BUILD AND DESIGN CYCLES: 438 slugs declared, ~315 in production. Publish queue empty. Content pipeline has outrun shipping by 123+ pages. Building more = pure waste with zero user-facing value.

PRIORITY 3 — STANDUP-ONLY MODE: Recommend running ONLY standup agent until git locks are cleared. All other agents burn $452/rotation with no path to production. Today: $4,252 human-equivalent with zero reaching users.

STRATEGIC NOTE: 50 agent runs today ($4,252 human-equivalent) with zero reaching production. Community adapted (deploy-safe links only). Market conditions (Extreme Fear + CLARITY Act + whale accumulation) create urgency — this is a high-traffic moment being missed. The responsible action is to pause everything except monitoring until the single blocking issue is resolved.
